codeReview.summary: Feature daemon-response-types fully implements DataResponse enum with 6 typed variants (TaskList, TaskDetail, ConfigValue, MemoryResults, CostData, DaemonHealth) in swell-core/src/types.rs. DaemonEvent::DataResponse wraps Box<DataResponse> to satisfy clippy large_enum_variant warning. TaskList handler in commands.rs updated to return DataResponse::TaskList instead of Uuid::nil() hack. CLI updated to handle DataResponse::TaskList. Serde round-trip tests added for all variants.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation follows existing patterns - boxed enum variant with #[allow(clippy::large_enum_variant)] attribute, serde tag/content annotations, correlation_id propagation through all variants.

summary: Feature daemon-response-types passes review. DataResponse enum with all 6 typed variants properly implemented, boxed in DaemonEvent, serde round-trip tests added, Uuid::nil() hack eliminated from TaskList handler. Feature fulfills VAL-API-007: DaemonEvent::DataResponse carries typed query results.
